zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret FitzTancred於1125年出生在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特時，她的父親Richard FitzTancred25歲，母親Adela Bussy20歲。她於1149年與Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor在威爾士布洛可爾卡維結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1173年在英國越可爾波洛賀布利其享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret FitzTancred于1125年出生在威尔士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特时，她的父亲Richard FitzTancred25岁，母亲Adela Bussy20岁。她于1149年与Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor在威尔士布洛可爾卡維结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1173年在英国越可爾波洛賀布利其享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret FitzTancred was born in 1125, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Richard FitzTancred, was 25 and her mother, Adela Bussy, was 20. She married Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor in 1149, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1173, in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret FitzTancred est née en 1125, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Richard FitzTancred, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adela Bussy, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor en 1149, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1173, à Boroughbridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret FitzTancred 1125 in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard FitzTancred 25 und ihre Mutter Adela Bussy 20. Sie hat 1149 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1173 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzTancred è nata il nel 1125 nel Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Richard FitzTancred, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Adela Bussy, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor nel 1149, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1173, nel Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzTancredが1125年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストで生まれた時，父Richard FitzTancredは25歳，母Adela Bussyは20歳であった。1149年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウでOdo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1173年にイギリスヨークシュアイアボロウブリッジで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzTancred(이)가 1125년 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard FitzTancred(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adela Bussy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1149년 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 영국 요르크실르 버루그h브리지에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzTancred nasceu em 1125, em Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Richard FitzTancred, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adela Bussy, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor em 1149, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1173, em Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ro.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret FitzTancred родилась в 1125 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Richard FitzTancred было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela Bussy, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor в 1149 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1173 г. в местности бороугбридж, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret FitzTancred nació en 1125, en Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Richard FitzTancred, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adela Bussy, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor en 1149, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1173, en Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
